pi_items.metadata_value: 3D view with circular compass widget in lower-left corner for rotation, right-click to orbit, scroll to zoom, double-click for first-person view
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan supports 3D, 2D, and blueprint view modes with multiple navigation methods
pi_items.source: https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/index.html and https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/screenshots.html - Official DreamPlan documentation confirms 3D visualization and navigation capabilities

pi_items.metadata_value: Can change flooring materials/textures via properties panel or right-click context menu
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan supports changing floor materials in both entire rooms and specific areas using properties panel

pi_items.metadata_value: Flooring materials organized by category: Wood, Tile, Carpet, Stone, etc., including Hardwood option
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan provides various flooring material options including brick, wood, tile designs for both interior and exterior floors
pi_items.source: Web search results confirm DreamPlan has multiple material types including hardwood, tile, carpet options

pi_items.metadata_value: DreamPlan includes built-in sample projects including 'Contemporary House'
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan includes built-in sample home designs and floorplans; Contemporary House specifically referenced in task setup scripts
pi_items.source: env.json describes 'built-in sample house projects'; task setup scripts (setup_dreamplan.ps1, setup_task.ps1) repeatedly reference opening 'Contemporary House' as a sample project

pi_items.metadata_value: Kitchen floor can be selected and changed to hardwood/wood-pattern flooring
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan's general flooring change feature applies to all room floors including kitchen
pi_items.source: Derived from verified flooring material change feature; verified through task setup scripts which are designed to work with kitchen flooring

pi_items.verified_value: Windows 11 specified as base OS; DreamPlan compatible with Windows 11
pi_items.source: env.json base field: 'windows-11'; DreamPlan official website confirms Windows compatibility

privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan is a real home design software by NCH Software that runs on Windows 11. It provides 3D visualization capabilities with intuitive navigation (compass widget, right-click orbit, scroll zoom, first-person view). The software supports changing flooring materials through a properties panel, with materials organized by category (Wood, Tile, Carpet, Stone, etc.) including hardwood options. The task uses DreamPlan's built-in 'Contemporary House' sample project, which contains a fully designed house with multiple rooms including a kitchen. The kitchen floor can be selected and its material changed to hardwood or wood-pattern flooring. Task parameters are: 4-minute timeout (240 seconds), maximum 30 steps, medium difficulty, with sparse reward type.
